# Lily — Plant Care App

> Smart reminders, AI diagnosis, and care schedules personalized to every plant in your home.

Lily is a mobile app for iOS and Android that helps plant owners keep their plants alive and thriving. It combines personalized care scheduling, AI-powered plant identification and disease diagnosis, care logging, and community features in one app. Over 10,000 plants are tracked by Lily users, and the app holds a 4.8 star rating on the App Store.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://withlily.app/en): Product overview, features, pricing, and FAQ
- [Blog](https://withlily.app/en/blog): Plant care guides, tips, and troubleshooting
- [Privacy Policy](https://withlily.app/en/privacy): How we handle user data
- [Terms of Service](https://withlily.app/en/terms): Usage terms

## Features

- Plant collection management with photos, health status, and care schedules
- Personalized reminders for watering, fertilizing, and misting — tailored to each plant's location and conditions
- AI-powered plant identification using your phone camera (thousands of species)
- AI chat for diagnosis and care advice, with context on your specific plant's age, care history, and environment
- Care history logging for every plant
- Achievement system with badges and milestones
- Social profiles — follow other plant lovers and showcase your collection
- Room-based plant organization to track how each environment affects growth
- Push notifications for care reminders
- Cross-device sync (iOS and Android)

## Pricing

- 7-day free trial, no credit card required upfront
- Monthly: $4.99/month
- Annual: $29.99/year (~$2.50/month, save 50%)
- All features included in every plan
- Cancel anytime from App Store or Play Store settings

## FAQ

### Is there really no credit card required?
Yes. You download the app, start your 7-day free trial, and you're never asked for payment details upfront. You only enter payment info if you choose to subscribe after the trial.

### What happens when the 7-day trial ends?
You'll receive a reminder 3 days before the trial ends. If you choose not to subscribe, your account stays active in read-only mode — you can still view your plant collection and history, you just won't receive new reminders or use the AI features.

### How is Lily different from Planta or Greg?
Lily combines personalized care scheduling, AI plant diagnosis, and social features in one app — without the bloated subscription tiers. Every feature is available from day one, and care schedules are tailored to your specific plant's location and conditions, not just the species defaults.

### How accurate is the AI plant diagnosis?
The AI is trained on thousands of plant diseases, pests, and care issues. It also has context on your specific plant — its age, care history, and environment — which makes its advice significantly more accurate than generic tools. For rare conditions, it will always recommend consulting a specialist.

## Download

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/lily-plant-care/id6504462690
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lilyapp.plants
